data.title: Mazdutide shows significant weight loss in Chinese adolescents with obesity: 8.78-10.99% BMI reductions, 7.72-8.65 kg weight loss in 12 weeks.
data.description: Following a 12-week treatment regimen, participants in the 4 mg and 6 mg mazdutide groups experienced notable decreases in BMI from the initial measurements by 8.78% and 10.99% respectively. The corresponding reductions in body weight were 7.72 kg and 8.65 kg for each group. These outcomes were significantly better than those seen in the placebo group.

data.title: Perca, Inc. is conducting a trial using vermifiltration to treat seafood processing wastewater, aiming to advance sustainability.
data.description: A cutting-edge trial using vermifiltration technology has been initiated by Perca, Inc. in Walla Walla, Washington, with the goal of advancing sustainability in the seafood industry. The innovative, low-energy wastewater treatment method is set to revolutionize seafood processing. The trial, launched on Dec. 11, 2025, marks a significant step towards more environmentally friendly practices. Perca, Inc. aims to reduce its carbon footprint by incorporating this groundbreaking technology, contributing to the industry's overall sustainability. This trial signifies a milestone in advancing eco-conscious initiatives within the seafood sector.

data.title: Pebble Beach Concours d'Elegance aims to raise $5 million in 2026 to surpass $50 million in lifetime charitable giving. #charity #fundraising
data.description: Contribute to our cause and see your impact double! In 2026, we aim to raise $5 million as part of our goal to surpass $50 million in lifetime charitable giving. Recently announced in Pebble Beach, California on Dec. 11, 2025, the Pebble Beach Concours d'Elegance is excited to introduce a challenge grant that will match donations up to $1 million.

data.title: Venzee Technologies updates on deal with Digital Commerce Payments Inc., acquire Jasper SaaS for PIM. TSXV: VENZ.
data.description: Vancouver-based Venzee Technologies Inc. (TSXV: VENZ) has issued an update regarding its acquisition deal with Digital Commerce Payments Inc. (DCP) for DCP’s Jasper Software as a Service (SaaS) Product Information Management (PIM) Solution business. The transaction, revealed on November 3, 2025, is progressing smoothly. Venzee recently disclosed the outcomes of its annual general and special meeting.

data.title: Sienna plans to issue $250M of 3.524% Series F Debentures and redeem C$175M of Series B Debentures.
data.description: In a recent update, it was reported that the number of Covid-19 cases has surged to over 5 million worldwide. The death toll has also risen to more than 300,000 as the pandemic continues to impact countries across the globe. In the United States alone, there have been over 1.5 million cases and 90,000 deaths, making it the worst affected country. In response to the crisis, governments have implemented various measures such as lockdowns and social distancing guidelines to curb the spread of the virus. Researchers are working tirelessly to develop a vaccine, but it is still in the testing phase and may take some time before it is widely available. The World Health Organization has advised the public to continue practicing proper hygiene and follow health guidelines to protect themselves and others from the virus.
